api.byoa_upgrade: Bring Your Own API (BYOA) keys are available on all plans. Add your API key in workspace settings.
api.conversation_upgrade: Conversation API is available on all plans. {plan} includes {conversationKeys} key and {apiMessages} messages/month. Upgrade to {toPlan} for {toConversationKeys} keys and {toApiMessages} messages/month.
api.key_id_required: Workspace ID and key ID are required.
api.provider_key_required: AI provider and API key are required.
api.unsupported_provider: This AI provider is not supported. Please use a supported provider.
api.webhooks_upgrade: Outbound webhooks are available on all plans. {plan} includes {webhookEndpoints} endpoints. Upgrade to {toPlan} for {toWebhookEndpoints} endpoints.
auth.code_or_token_required: Authentication code or access token is required. Please try signing in again.
auth.email_required: Email address is required to send a magic link.
auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
auth.invalid_provider: Invalid authentication provider. Please use GitHub or Google to sign in.
auth.invalid_state: Invalid or expired authentication state. Please try signing in again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.session_invalid: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
auth.unauthorized: You are not signed in. Please sign in to continue.
billing.no_subscription: No active subscription found. Please subscribe first.
billing.overage_requires_subscription: Overage billing requires an active subscription with a payment method on file.
billing.subscription_exists: This workspace already has an active subscription. Manage it from the billing portal.
branches.contentrain_only: Only contentrain/ branches can be managed through Studio.
branches.merge_forbidden: You do not have permission to merge branches in this project.
branches.reject_forbidden: You do not have permission to reject branches in this project.
cdn.content_not_found: The requested content was not found in CDN storage.
cdn.key_expired: This API key has expired. Please generate a new one in project settings.

cdn.key_name_required: A name is required when creating an API key.

cdn.origin_not_allowed: Your request origin is not in the allowed origins list for this API key.
cdn.path_required: A content path is required to fetch CDN content.
cdn.storage_not_configured: CDN storage is not configured. Contact your administrator to set up storage credentials.
cdn.upgrade: CDN delivery is available on all plans. {plan} includes {cdnBandwidth} bandwidth and {cdnKeys} API keys. Upgrade to {toPlan} for {toCdnBandwidth} bandwidth and {toCdnKeys} keys.
chat.conversation_create_failed: Failed to create a new conversation. Please try again.
